page.title: Memberships & plans
page.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your rhythm. No long-term commitments.

trust.title: Auto-renewal
trust.desc: Convenient and transparent, no hidden charges.

trust.title: Human support
trust.desc: We help you with any questions about your plan.

cancel.q: Can I cancel my membership anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. Cancel from your dashboard before the renewal date and you won't be charged for the next cycle.

pause.a: Yes, you can pause for up to 30 days from your account. Unused classes are preserved until you reactivate.

upgrade.a: Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade from your profile at any time.
